raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on language and organization, or on substantive argument and contribution positioning?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request may require reframing the section's contribution claim and motivation above the sentence level.","R1.2":"Helping with the section centrally includes checking whether the method description and prior-work setup form a coherent argument chain.","R1.5":"Because the artifact is a full section-like passage, section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausible central responsibilities.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a paper section commonly entails sentence- and paragraph-level polish.","RX.1":"The delegation is underspecified, so uncertainty about the intended type of help must be disclosed.","RX.2":"Any projected help must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the section supports.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projecting responsibilities rather than editing or evaluating the artifact directly.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid assigning responsibilities that could lead to misleading scientific presentation or unsupported claims.","RX.5":"Responsibility assignments should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the visible features of the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on language and organization, or on substantive argument and contribution positioning?

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request may require reframing the section's contribution claim and motivation above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: Helping with the section centrally includes checking whether the method description and prior-work setup form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.5: Because the artifact is a full section-like passage, section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausible central responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a paper section commonly entails sentence- and paragraph-level polish.
rationale.RX.1: The delegation is underspecified, so uncertainty about the intended type of help must be disclosed.
rationale.RX.2: Any projected help must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the section supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projecting responsibilities rather than editing or evaluating the artifact directly.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid assigning responsibilities that could lead to misleading scientific presentation or unsupported claims.
rationale.RX.5: Responsibility assignments should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the visible features of the artifact.
